GROW WITH RASINDU
TINY MACRO ANIMAL VIDEOS
–  GUIDE
JOIN OUR TELEGRAM CHANNEL👉 GrowWithRasindu
JOIN OUR WHATSAPP CHANNEL👉 GrowWithRasindu
Join my community to get future prompts and complete step-by-step guides
👉 nas.io/growwithrasindu
This guide is written in simple English.If you prefer to read this in your own language,copy this entire guide and paste it into ChatGPT.Then type: "Translate this into [your language]"and it will give you the full guide in your language.
මෙම මාර්ගෝපදේශය සරල ඉංග්‍රීසියෙන් ලියා ඇත.ඔබට ඔබේ භාෂාවෙන් කියවීමට අවශ්‍ය නම්,
මෙම සම්පූර්ණ මාර්ගෝපදේශය copy කර ChatGPT වෙත paste කරන්න.එවිට මෙසේ type කරන්න: "Translate this into Sinhala"එවිට ඔබට සිංහල භාෂාවෙන් සම්පූර්ණ මාර්ගෝපදේශය ලැබෙනු ඇත.
यह गाइड सरल अंग्रेजी में लिखी गई है।अगर आप इसे अपनी भाषा में पढ़ना चाहते हैं,तो इस पूरी गाइड को copy करके ChatGPT में paste करें।फिर टाइप करें: "Translate this into Hindi"और आपको पूरी गाइड हिंदी में मिल जाएगी।
هذا الدليل مكتوب باللغة الإنجليزية البسيطة.
إذا كنت تفضل قراءته بلغتك الخاصة،
انسخ هذا الدليل كاملاً والصقه في ChatGPT.
ثم اكتب: "Translate this into Arabic"
وستحصل على الدليل كاملاً باللغة العربية.
What You'll Create
Ultra-realistic AI-generated macro videos of miniature animals standing on a human fingertip — ready to post as viral Facebook Reels or TikTok content.
Tools You Need
Claude AI — to generate image and video prompts from the Master Prompt
Google Flow (ImageFX / VideoFX) — to generate the image and video
CapCut — to arrange clips, add background music, and export the final Reel
Step-by-Step Workflow
Step 1 — Paste the Master Prompt into Claude AI
Open Claude AI at claude.ai
Start a new chat
Copy the entire Master Prompt and paste it into the chat
Press Enter
Claude will immediately generate a list of 10 unique tiny animal ideas with descriptions
Each animal includes texture, color, and pattern details so you can preview what it will look like
Step 2 — Pick an Animal from the List
Read through the 10 animal options
Pick the one that looks most visually interesting to you
Type the number (for example: 3) and press Enter
Claude will generate two prompts for you:
Image Prompt — a detailed multi-paragraph prompt for generating the still image
Video Prompt — a detailed multi-paragraph prompt for generating the video clip
Step 3 — Generate the Image in Google Flow
Open Google Flow (ImageFX)
Copy the Image Prompt from Claude
Paste it into Google Flow's text input
Generate the image
Review the result — you should see a hyper-realistic macro photo of the tiny animal sitting on a fingertip
If the result doesn't look right, generate again until you get a clean realistic output
Download the image you're happy with
Step 4 — Generate the Video in Google Flow
Open Google Flow (VideoFX)
Copy the Video Prompt from Claude
Paste it into the text input
Upload the image you just generated as the Start Frame (reference image)
This tells the AI to use your image as the first frame and animate from there
Generate the video
Review the result — the animal should be moving, breathing, and interacting with the finger naturally
If the motion doesn't look good, generate again
Download the video clip
Step 5 — Repeat for Multiple Clips
Go back to Claude and type NEXT or NEW
Claude will generate a fresh list of 10 completely different animals
Pick another animal and repeat Steps 3 and 4
Generate 3 to 5 different animal clips for one Reel
Download all of them
Alternatively, you can type any animal name directly (for example: Pangolin) and Claude will skip the list and generate prompts immediately
Step 6 — Edit Everything in CapCut
Open CapCut (desktop or mobile)
Create a new project in 9:16 vertical format
Import all your downloaded video clips
Arrange them on the timeline in the order you want
Trim any clips if needed — cut out slow starts or awkward endings
Add smooth transitions between clips (simple crossfade or fade to black works best)
Add background music:
Use CapCut's built-in music library.
Adjust music volume so it doesn't overpower the visuals
Export the final video in 1080x1920 (9:16) at the highest quality
Grow with Rasindu
